search_query: legal disposal of old office printers
combined_text: DO I NEED TO RECYCLE MY OLD PHOTOCOPIER and PRINTER? DO I NEED TO RECYCLE MY OLD PHOTOCOPIER and PRINTER? New Laws for Jersey, New York City, NY, PA, CT and surrounding States have now made it illegal to dump old printers, copiers and fax machines in the trash.
